title: JIngHui
description: Some armors and weapons have been added.添加了一些的盔甲与武器
body:
A series of Chinese-style equipment and decorative items, along with their corresponding crafting items and recipes, have been added to this mod. Each of these items has its own unique 3D model. Additionally, some armors possess special effects and skills. Playing with this mod can make your survival or creative gameplay even more interesting!
